zh.Aberffraw Castle, Anglesy, Wales: 威爾士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw於0974年出生在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素時，她的父親Gwair ap Pwyll-10歲，母親Gwair ap Pwyll-11歲。她於1040年與Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1053年10月17日在她的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.Aberffraw Castle, Anglesy, Wales: 威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw于0974年出生在威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素时，她的父亲Gwair ap Pwyll-10岁，母亲Gwair ap Pwyll-11岁。她于1040年与Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1053年10月17日在她的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gweir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: topographic name for someone who lived by a dam or weir on a river, from Middle English, Older Scots wer(e) ‘weir; fish-trap’. Compare Ware and Wear . In northern England and lowland Scotland there has been much confusion with the Irish and Scottish Gaelic names in 2, 4 and 5 below.
Scottish: in Scotland, this surname was sometimes used for Gaelic Mac an Mhaoir ‘son of the steward’, more often Anglicized as McNair .

Scottish (of Norman origin): surname of a family of Blackwood (Lanarkshire), which is said to be descended from Ralph de Ver, a Norman baron associated with William the Lion between 1174 and 1184. The change in pronunciation from Vere to Were would be unusual in Anglo-Norman French, and the true source of the surname may lie elsewhere. One possibility is Wierre in Pas-de-Calais. Another possibility is that the surname may represent versions of the Norman surname de la Were ‘of the war’, a nickname for a warrior; see Warr .

variants.name: Ware
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by or looked after a dam or weir on a river (from Old English wær, wer, Middle English war(e), warre, wer(e), werre ‘weir’), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Weare (Somerset), Weare Giffard (Devon), or Ware (Hertfordshire).
topographic name for someone who lived by a horse pond or fish pond, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English wayour, which became early modern English ware, wear.

variants.name: McNair
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Iain Uidhir ‘son of sallow John’. This form is associated mainly with Ross-shire.

Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Fhuibhir ‘son of the smith’, Mac an Fhuidhir ‘the stranger's son’, or Mac an Oighre ‘son of the heir’, which despite different pronunciation have all been suggested to explain this surname. It was sometimes also Anglicized as Weir . The surname evidently arrived late in Ireland, from Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw was born in 0974, in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales, her father, Gwair ap Pwyll, was -10 and her mother, Gwair ap Pwyll, was -11. She married Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal in 1040, in County Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 17 October 1053, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw est née en 0974, à Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Gwair ap Pwyll, avait -10 ans et sa mère, Gwair ap Pwyll, avait -11 ans. Elle a épousé Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal en 1040, à County Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 octobre 1053, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw 0974 in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwair ap Pwyll -10 und ihre Mutter Gwair ap Pwyll -11. Sie hat 1040 in County Dublin, Irland Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. Oktober 1053 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw è nata il nel 0974 nel Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, sua padre, Gwair ap Pwyll, aveva -10 anni e sua madre, Gwair ap Pwyll, aveva -11 anni. Lei sposato Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal nel 1040, nel County Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 ottobre 1053, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffrawが0974年にウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウ カストルで生まれた時，父Gwair ap Pwyllは-10歳，母Gwair ap Pwyllは-11歳であった。1040年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンでLago of Aberffrawap Idwalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1053年10月17日に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw(이)가 0974년 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwair ap Pwyll(은)는 -10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwair ap Pwyll(은)는 -11세였다. 그녀는 1040년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린에서 Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1053년 10월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw nasceu em 0974, em Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Gwair ap Pwyll, tinha -10 anos e sua mãe, Gwair ap Pwyll, tinha -11 anos. Ela casou-se com Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal em 1040, em County Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1053, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw родилась в 0974 г. в местности абирффрав кастл, англеси, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gwair ap Pwyll было -10 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwair ap Pwyll, -11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal в 1040 г. в местности коунти дублинь, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 октября 1053 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw nació en 0974, en Aberffraw Castle, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Gwair ap Pwyll, tenía -10 años y su mamá, Gwair ap Pwyll, tenía -11 años. Se casó con Lago of Aberffrawap Idwal en 1040, en County Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1053, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
